data.name: ChooseLanguage
data.value: 🌍 Оберіть мову / Choose language / Wybierz język / Выберите язык:

data.name: Welcome
data.value:
👋 Welcome, {0}!
🚖 You have contacted TaxiUA Support.
Choose what you're interested in:

data.name: EnterDescription
data.value:
✅ Topic: {0}
✍️ Describe your problem in detail:

data.name: RequestAccepted
data.value: ⏳ Your request has been received. Please wait for an operator.

data.name: ChatEndedByOperator
data.value: ✅ The operator ended the chat. Thank you for contacting us! 🚖

data.name: ChatEndedByUser
data.value: ✅ Chat ended. Thank you for contacting us! 🚖

data.name: Contacts
data.value:
📞 *Support Contacts*
📱 Phone: +380 XX XXX XX XX 📧 Email: support@taxi.ua 🕐 Working hours: 08:00 – 22:00

data.name: About
data.value:
🚖 *About Us*
We are a reliable taxi service operating since 2015. Our goal is your comfort and safety on the road.

data.name: UseMenuOrStart
data.value: Use the menu below or press /start

data.name: NotInChat
data.value: You are not connected to any operator.

data.name: ChatStarted
data.value: ✅ Your request has been sent to an operator. Wait for a response or press the button below to end the chat.

data.name: AllOperatorsBusy
data.value: 😔 All operators are currently busy. Your request has been registered, an operator will contact you soon.
